meta.title: Projects | SGS
meta.description: Image-led SGS projects across utility-scale solar advisory, hybrid infrastructure coordination, desalination strategy, and industrial support.

hero.title: Selected infrastructure projects
hero.text: These project examples reflect the kind of strategic and technical work SGS supports across regional and international markets.

stories.title: Solar development support for a major regional energy program
stories.text: Scope included project positioning, technology alignment, and early partnership planning for large-scale renewable deployment.

stories.title: Integrated clean infrastructure planning across multiple workstreams
stories.text: SGS coordinated energy, procurement, and delivery interfaces where technical fit and partner structure were both critical.

stories.title: Water and energy planning shaped as one infrastructure narrative
stories.text: Designed to support stronger sustainability outcomes while keeping technical decisions practical and coordinated.

stories.title: RO and desalination strategy for long-term water security planning
stories.text: Work focused on technical option review, supplier coordination, and delivery planning for high-value utility infrastructure.

stories.title: Vendor and technical coordination for active industrial programs
stories.text: SGS aligned specialist suppliers, project interfaces, and delivery expectations across a multi-party infrastructure environment.

cta.title: Talk to SGS about your next regional infrastructure opportunity
